assetsDesc: Cash, bank cards, and manual assets.
investmentsDesc: US stocks, US ETFs, A-shares, A-share ETFs, metals, and crypto.
debtsDesc: Payables, receivables, and local proof images.
emptyAssetsSubtitle: Add cash, bank accounts, or manual assets. The net worth card will summarize them.
emptyInvestmentsSubtitle: Add stocks, ETFs, precious metals, or crypto. The app will value them through your quote API.
emptyDebtsSubtitle: Track money you owe or money others owe you, with optional local proof images.
name: Name
addCashSubtitle: Cash, bank cards, and manual assets
addInvestmentSubtitle: US stocks, US ETFs, A-shares, A-share ETFs, metals, crypto
addDebtSubtitle: Debt, loan, and local proof images
exportBackupDesc: Copy to clipboard. Export before changing devices.
importBackupDesc: Import old data from clipboard or text.
privacyNote: Note: assets and debts are stored only on this device. Valuation sends the asset list to your quote API and does not store it on a server.
enterPositiveNumber: Please enter a number greater than 0
enterPositiveAmount: Please enter an amount greater than 0
imageProofDesc: Add up to 3 chat records, transfer screenshots, or IOU photos. Images are compressed and saved locally, not uploaded.
localImageNotice: Images are stored only on this device and are not uploaded. JSON backups will include these images.
nameHintMetal: Enter precious metals / Gold / Silver / XAU / XAG
nameHintStock: Enter Apple / AAPL / Tesla / TSLA / IBKR
nameHintEtf: Enter QQQ / QQQM / SPY / SCHD / SGOV
cryptoSymbolHint: Auto-fills CoinGecko ID, e.g. solana / bitcoin / tether
metalSymbolHint: XAU for gold, XAG for silver
stockSymbolHint: e.g. AAPL / TSLA / IBKR / MU / WDC
etfSymbolHint: e.g. QQQM / QQQI / SPYI / VXUS / SCHD
cryptoHelp: Crypto suggestions use the local hot list first. After configuring the API, CoinGecko search is also used. The symbol field stores the CoinGecko ID, e.g. SOL becomes solana.
metalHelp: Precious metals support XAU gold, XAG silver, XPT platinum, and XPD palladium. Unit gram means grams; troy_ounce means troy ounces.
stockHelp: US stocks support local suggestions and remote fuzzy search. Enter a company name or symbol; selecting one fills name and symbol.
etfHelp: US ETFs support QQQ, QQQM, SPY, VOO, SCHD, SGOV, and remote search.
manualHelp: Manual assets do not call the quote API. Value = quantity × manual price.
cashHelp: Cash/bank values are converted from their currency to the default currency.
noCryptoMatch: No common coin matched. Configure the API to search CoinGecko, or enter a CoinGecko ID manually.
noStockMatch: No common stock matched. Configure the API to search Twelve Data, or enter a symbol manually.
noEtfMatch: No common ETF matched. Configure the API to search Twelve Data, or enter an ETF symbol manually.
noMetalMatch: Supported precious metals: XAU gold, XAG silver, XPT platinum, XPD palladium.
debtNamePayableHint: e.g. credit card, mortgage, money you owe
debtNameReceivableHint: e.g. money lent to a friend, receivable
apiAddressRequired: Please set the API base URL first
apiTokenHint: Enter the APP_API_TOKEN set in Cloudflare Worker
refreshTimeoutError: Quote refresh timed out. Local valuation is shown for now. Check your network or API service and try again.
aboutUsDesc: Open-source notes, tech stack, third-party packages, and sponsorship addresses.
aboutAppIntro: Ledger is a local-first personal asset tracking app. Assets, investments, and debts are stored on this device by default. Market valuation is fetched through the quote API you configure. This project is intended to be open-sourced on GitHub for learning, customization, and contributions.
aboutChatGptDesc: Used to help with requirement analysis, code generation, and troubleshooting.
aboutFlutterDesc: Cross-platform app framework for Android and iOS.
aboutGetXDesc: Used for state management, routing, dialogs, and localization.
aboutHttpDesc: Used for requesting the quote aggregation API.
aboutSharedPrefsDesc: Used to store settings, assets, investments, and debts locally.
aboutImagePickerDesc: Used to select or capture local debt proof images.
aboutImageDesc: Used to compress local proof images.
aboutLauncherIconsDesc: Used to generate Android and iOS app launcher icons.
aboutCloudflareDesc: Used to deploy the quote aggregation API.
sponsorshipDesc: If this open-source project helps you, you can sponsor it through the crypto addresses below. These addresses can be configured in the source code.
donationAddressHint: Sponsorship addresses are configured in lib/data/about_catalog.dart. Replace them with your own addresses before publishing, or leave them empty.
apiAddressRequiredDetail: Please enter the API base URL in Settings, for example https://api.example.com.
apiTokenRequiredDetail: Please enter the API token in Settings. It should match APP_API_TOKEN configured in Cloudflare Worker/Pages.
apiTimeoutDetail: Network is unstable and the API timed out. Cached values are shown.
apiUnauthorizedDetail: The API token is missing or incorrect. Check that the token matches APP_API_TOKEN in Cloudflare.
apiNotFoundDetail: The API endpoint was not found. Enter only the domain as the API URL, for example https://api.example.com, not /api/health.
apiServerErrorDetail: The API service returned an error (@status). Try again later or check Cloudflare Worker logs.
apiRequestFailedDetail: API request failed (@status). Check the API URL and token.
apiResponseInvalid: The API response format is invalid. Check whether the quote API is deployed correctly.
apiDnsErrorDetail: Network is unstable and the API host "@host" cannot be reached. Cached values are shown.
apiConnectionRefusedDetail: The API service cannot be reached right now. Cached values are shown.
apiTlsErrorDetail: The API HTTPS certificate connection failed. Cached values are shown.
apiNetworkErrorDetail: Network is unstable and the API cannot be reached. Cached values are shown.
appLockDesc: When enabled, you must unlock the app before viewing your balances whenever the app opens or returns from the background.
appLockDisabled: Off. The app opens directly to the home page.
appLockDeviceEnabled: On: fingerprint / Face ID with 6-digit PIN fallback
appLockPinEnabled: On: unlock with a 6-digit app PIN
useDeviceBiometricsDesc: Requires a 6-digit PIN first. The app tries fingerprint / Face ID first, and falls back to the PIN if biometrics fail.
useSixDigitPinDesc: Set or change the 6-digit PIN used only by this app. After 8 failed attempts, local data will be wiped.
setSixDigitPinDesc: Set a 6-digit PIN. After 8 failed attempts, all local assets, debts, API token, and lock settings will be wiped.
pinConfirmMismatch: The two PIN entries do not match
deviceBiometricsUnavailable: No fingerprint / Face ID is available, or biometrics are not enabled on this device.
biometricSetupReason: Verify your fingerprint or Face ID to enable App Lock
unlockWithBiometricsDesc: Use your fingerprint or Face ID to unlock.
biometricAuthFailed: Biometric authentication failed. Please try again.
dataWipedAfterFailedAttempts: After 8 failed PIN attempts, all local app data has been wiped.
privacyLockHint: App Lock protects access on this device. If biometrics fail, you can still use your 6-digit PIN.
pinRequiredBeforeBiometrics: Set a 6-digit PIN first so you can still unlock the app if biometrics fail.
pinSetBeforeBiometricsToast: PIN set. Continue to verify biometrics.
biometricLockEnabled: Biometrics enabled. Your 6-digit PIN will be used as a fallback.
unlockWithBiometricsOrPinDesc: Use fingerprint / Face ID to unlock. If biometrics fail, enter your 6-digit PIN instead.
biometricAuthFailedUsePin: Biometric authentication failed. You can try again or use your 6-digit PIN.
privacySnapshotDesc: App Lock is enabled. Balances are hidden in the app switcher. Unlock when you return.
maxThreeImages: You can add up to 3 images.
billsDesc: Income and expense records for the selected month.
emptyBillsSubtitle: Track meals, drinks, rent, utilities, salary, and other income or expenses.
billLocalOnlyHelp: Bills are stored only on this device and used to summarize monthly income and expenses.
fundsDesc: Cash, bank cards, and manually valued assets.
billLinkedAssetHelp: If a fund is linked, expenses deduct it and income adds to it. If an investment is linked, expenses add investment quantity and income reduces it.
sortHint: Long-press the handle on the right to reorder
cnStockHelp: A-shares support local suggestions and remote search. Codes can be 600519, SH600519, 000001.SZ, etc.
cnEtfHelp: A-share ETFs support local suggestions and remote search. Codes can be 510300, SH510300, 159915.SZ, etc.
noCnStockMatch: No common A-share matched. Configure the API for remote search, or manually enter a stock code.
noCnEtfMatch: No common A-share ETF matched. Configure the API for remote search, or manually enter an ETF code.
